title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Email confirmed via district curriculum materials review article. Note district uses muschools.com email domain rather than milton-union.k12.oh.us.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (~717 students) with no public dedicated curriculum director listed. Superintendent John Knapp is the best contact. Lori Grimaldi appears on third-party lists as a Curriculum Specialist but no confirmed email on district site. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Teaching & Learning
notes: Operates dedicated Mt. Healthy Early Learning Center for Pre-K and Kindergarten (opened 2021). Wolfe oversees T&L department including ESL Coordinators and Academic Coaches.

title: K-6 Principal
notes: Small district (~827 students), no dedicated curriculum director identified. K-6 Principal Diane Kramer is closest ECE-relevant leader. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: K-6 Principal
notes: Very small district. No dedicated curriculum director; Supt. Danielle Davis and K-6 Principal Laurie Grube are best ECE-relevant contacts. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district (~600 students). No dedicated curriculum director surfaced. Superintendent Ken Boyer is the best contact. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Warren in role since July 2023; previously principal at Canal Winchester. District uses northridgevikings.org for staff emails.

title: Superintendent (formerly Director of Curriculum and Personnel)
notes: McCumber was Director of Curriculum and Personnel and appointed acting/permanent Superintendent in 2024 after prior superintendent placed on leave. Email format uses tccsa.net (Tri-County Computer Services Association consortium) - confirmed pattern; this is district staff, not an ESC routing.

title: Elementary Principal
notes: No dedicated curriculum director identified at district level; Board contact Ann Gerber handles curriculum communications. Elementary Principal Vince Sette is the best ECE-relevant lead with confirmed district email.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Dr. Goss began August 2024 and oversees development and implementation of all instructional programs district-wide (no dedicated curriculum director - Asst Supt holds that portfolio).

title: Elementary Principal / Preschool Director
notes: Small district. Carter directly oversees preschool/elementary, making her the de facto ECE decision-maker. Superintendent Kevin Finefrock is the next-level option. District also branded as 'East Canton Schools'.

title: Director of Teaching & Learning
notes: Email format follows first.last@painesville-city.k12.oh.us pattern (confirmed by multiple staff). District runs Red Raider Preschool. Curriculum Coordinators Nicole Byers and Erin Cirino also support.

notes: Email inferred from district domain pauldingschools.org (j***@pauldingschools.org per ZoomInfo). Manz formerly principal at Oakwood Elementary.

title: Director of Secondary Teaching & Learning
notes: District has both Director of Secondary T&L and Assistant Director Joe Sarnes. Email inferred via standard first-initial+lastname@perrysburgschools.net pattern. District added asst director of T&L recently to support curriculum initiatives.

title: Superintendent
notes: District uses pleasantlocalschools.org as primary domain. No public curriculum director - Director of Student Services Shelly Dason is alternative contact. Email needed - check Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
